ns0:entry.ns0:title: Gentleman-Programming/gentle-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/gentle-ai
Language: go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SagerNet/sing-box
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SagerNet/sing-box
Language: go
The universal proxy platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tencent/WeKnora
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tencent/WeKnora
Language: go
Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: XTLS/Xray-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core
Language: go
Xray, Penetrates Everything. Also the best v2ray-core. Where the magic happens. An open platform for various uses.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aquasecurity/trivy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy
Language: go
Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bruin-data/ingestr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bruin-data/ingestr
Language: go
ingestr is a CLI tool to copy data between any databases with a single command seamlessly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: caddyserver/caddy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/caddyserver/caddy
Language: go
Fast and extensible multi-platform HTTP/1-2-3 web server with automatic HTTPS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cisco-ai-defense/defenseclaw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cisco-ai-defense/defenseclaw

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/Fabric
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/Fabric
Language: go
Fabric is an open-source framework for augmenting humans using AI. It provides a modular system for solving specific problems using a crowdsourced set of AI prompts that can be used anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: docker/compose
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/docker/compose
Language: go

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grafana/alloy
Language: go
OpenTelemetry Collector distribution with programmable pipelines

URL: https://github.com/james-6-23/codex2api

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kedacore/keda
Language: go
KEDA is a Kubernetes-based Event Driven Autoscaling component. It provides event driven scale for any container running in Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sartoopjj/thefeed
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sartoopjj/thefeed
Language: go
DNS-based feed reader for Telegram channels and public X accounts. Designed for environments where only DNS queries work.
